data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. OUR NEMESIS went forward from a wide draw last time out and finished last of 11 over 1400m at Belmont Park after racing wide for the entire trip. Racing in an easier line-up will be well fancied to return to top three form. 4. HENRY THE AVIATOR finished third of 14 over 1600m at this track last start after racing wide for the entire trip. He drops 5.5kg in weight and jumping from an inside draw is worth an each-way ticket. 8. UNI QUEEN scored an all the way win here last start over 1600m at this track. That continued the good form this prep with two wins from five runs. She jumps from the inside draw and dropping back in distance could prove hard to beat once again. 3. HEAD'EM was allowed to drift back in the running after jumping from a wide draw last time out, then came home strongly from ninth of 10 into the turn to finish second over 1230m at this track. Racing over 270m more in distance today will be well supported to go one better.","runners":[2,4,8,3],"exclusive":true}
